name: Pimenta
title: The Rose Knight

startingAbility.name: Pepper Spray
startingAbility.rawText: Create a poison cloud around Pimenta for 4 seconds. Each second, deal 5 (+50% Magic, +50% Defense) damage and inflict 2 (+1 per 25 Defense) Poison to enemies in the poison cloud. Each second after Stall (15), gain 3 (+2 per rank) HP/S per enemy in the poison cloud.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Spicy
rankBSpecializations.rawText: On auto attack, for each type of Debuff on the target inflict 2 (+1 per rank) more of that Debuff and deal 10 (+75% Attack Speed) bonus damage.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Seasoned
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Pepper Spray expands in size and lasts 1 second longer. After Stall (15), Tanks and Mages gain 20 (+20 per rank) Defense. Backup.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Lover
rankBSpecializations.rawText: At start of combat, Heroes directly behind Pimenta permanently gain 15 Attack Speed. Sal gains 15 more.

quote: If they want you, they'll have to go through me.
